merged_prs.title: [15_0_X] HCALDQM: Revise of calibration tasks
[15.0.X] Fixing minor error in Scouting DQM module
[15.0.X] Switch `addOnTests.py` script from `getopt` to `argparse`
[15.0.X] fix `GeneralPurposeTrackAnalyzer` for `StreamHLTMonitor` events
[15_0_X] added new miniAODDQMBtagOnly sequence to OfflineDQM
[15_0_X] fix:Duplicate DeepCSV path removal, onnx model update
[15_0_X] L1T ZS L1Calo and hiZDC, update of CaloParamsHelperO2O.h
15_0_X Fixed outgoing R-hadron check for stop R-hadrons
[15_0_X] Deprecate PU trend plot in offline DQM for ECAL
[15_0_X] Enabling SiPixel good edge algorithm from 2025 onward
[15_0_X] Disabling irradiation bias correction from 2025 onward
Include scouting EGM in Online DQM stream

Fix documentation for SoftActivityJetNjets parameters
GEM TnP efficiency bugfix in the OfflineDQM
